## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss ongoing content strategy, AI initiatives, and plan a team training session for Superhuman's marketing team with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to expand content creation beyond SEO, focusing on thought leadership and AI-related content](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Superhuman aims to significantly increase content output in Q3/Q4, leveraging AI and GrowthX resources](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Team training session scheduled for July 16th to explore GrowthX capabilities and align on content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Superhuman cautious about direct competitor comparisons but open to startup-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Expansion

  - [Shifting focus from solely SEO blog content to include:](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [Repurposing podcast/webinar content for social media](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
      - [Long-form thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [AI-centric content for executives and website resources](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Aim to "10x" content production in Q3 and Q4](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Need for diverse content types: blog posts, PDF downloads, gated content, virtual event recordings](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### AI Initiatives and Reporting

  - [GrowthX developing workflow for podcast-to-LinkedIn post conversion](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Superhuman interested in AI/LLM traffic insights and keyword performance](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [New reporting format includes bullet points and specific metrics (e.g., 70% increase in keywords ranking for 1+ SERP features)](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Request for more AI/LLM-related insights in future reports](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Caution advised on extensive Superhuman vs. Notion comparisons to avoid potential conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Interest in monitoring Fixer, a potential competitor in the startup space](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Focus on creating content for startups, founders, and builders without direct comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Upcoming Partnerships and Programs

  - [Launching partnership with Brex next month](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Hiring a startup program manager for community, content, and events](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Opportunity for content creation around email productivity, AI-native tech for startups](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)

## Next Steps

  - Elvis to send updated ICP information to GrowthX team
  - [GrowthX to continue optimizing podcast-to-social media content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Megan to schedule July 16th training session for Superhuman's marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare presentation on AI, content, and SEO basics for Superhuman team](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Elvis to refine market trends research, focusing on AI implementation and productivity](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop startup-focused content series (avoiding direct competitor comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/6yTvCTfaJ547djsF7vMKYtmzt18UkyGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
